title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6042 / 58 OG No. 17, 3524 (April 23, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3312, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (b), under 11âCebu, page 162, paragraph (b), Title G, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Twenty hundred and ninety-three, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(b) Talaytay Communal Irrigation Project, Argao P20,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
